title: File not writable error in Read/Write Files node
symptom: The workflow fails with an error stating 'The file "file.json" is not writable.' when attempting to write to the file.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
not_this_if: Running in a Docker container with proper file access settings
root_cause: In n8n version 2.0 and above, there is a restriction on file system access for security reasons. This means that unless configured otherwise, n8n cannot write to certain file paths, leading to the error when trying to write to 'file.json'.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO to an empty string using the command 'set N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO=""'.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Set the N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO environment variable to allow file writing.
